OLLAMA_ENABLED.description: Deployment mode: 'yes' deploys the local Ollama container (gpu-local or cpu-local mode), empty switches to cloud mode where Hermes uses an external provider directly. Privacy: cloud mode sends prompts to a third party — opposite of OSCAR's default stance. Use only when local hardware isn't available.

GPU_PASSTHROUGH.description: Whether to request 'nvidia.com/gpu=1' on the Ollama container. Set to 'yes' for the gpu-local profile, empty for cpu-local (Ollama auto-falls back to CPU). Ignored when OLLAMA_ENABLED is empty (cloud mode).

POSTGRES_PASSWORD.description: Password for the internal Postgres database. Auto-generated on first deploy.

POSTGRES_PORT.description: Host port Postgres listens on for Hermes (host-installed) to reach in. Pod-local apps use the in-pod localhost:5432.

OLLAMA_PORT.description: Host port Ollama listens on. Hermes points its model provider here.

QDRANT_PORT.description: Host port for Qdrant HTTP API. Empty in Phase 0/1; populated in Phase 3a+.

TZ.description: IANA time zone for log timestamps.
